purpose: Based on scan results, recover governed external content into the 治理映射模版, create any missing managed directories, and sync mirror plus installed skill assets.
instruction: collect recovers only the visible contract surface from external AGENTS targets
collect may create missing managed directory structure from the scan result
collect updates only the internal 治理映射模版 human surface Part A while preserving internal frontmatter metadata
collect must not overwrite the internal Part B
workflow: open an external managed AGENTS file
extract the shell-free visible contract surface
replace only the internal 治理映射模版 human surface Part A block while preserving frontmatter metadata
rules: no separate machine sidecar is collected from external files
